## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor / chore
- [ ] ⚠️ Breaking change

## Platforms touched

- [ ] iOS
- [ ] Android
- [ ] Web
- [ ] JS/TS only

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `yarn nitrogen` if I changed a `*.nitro.ts` spec
- [ ] `yarn test`, `yarn typecheck`, and `yarn lint` pass
- [ ] New behavior has tests (pure helpers covered where possible)
- [ ] I verified the change in the example app (if native code changed)
- [ ] Docs updated (`docs/` and/or `website/`) where relevant

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123" -->
